name: Poppy Seed Almond Bread
recipeInstructions:
Mix dry ingredients in a small bowl. Set aside.
In a large bowl, mix the other ingredients.
Add the flour mixture to the liquid ingredients.
Bake in 4 small loaf pans or 2 large pans at 350 degrees for 50-60 minutes (or more).
Heat and brush glaze over bread while warm.
